products.menuLine: Talisker 10 Year · Isle of Skye, Scotland · $60 · 91.6 proof (45.8% ABV) · Notes: pepper, smoke

guidance.bestFor: Peppery cigar, coastal smoke, member wants peat with spice.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when pepper in the cigar should meet pepper and maritime smoke in the glass.
guidance.memberBlurb: Talisker 10 — black pepper and sea salt over maritime smoke. The Scotch that loves a spicy Nicaraguan as much as you do.

products.menuLine: Tanqueray No. Ten · England · $38 · 94.6 proof (47.3% ABV) · Notes: grapefruit, orange peel

guidance.bestFor: Martini order, citrus-forward gin, summer lounge.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when a martini matters — grapefruit, juniper, and citrus peel.
guidance.memberBlurb: Tanqueray No. Ten — grapefruit and juniper built for martinis. The gin pour when someone wants citrus beside a light cigar.

products.menuLine: Tito's Handmade Vodka · Texas · $28 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: clean, black pepper

guidance.bestFor: Vodka soda, martini, member wants America's top-selling spirit name.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants brown spirits or heavy flavor only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member names Tito's or wants the best-selling US vodka — clean, neutral, cocktail-ready.
guidance.memberBlurb: Tito's Handmade — America's best-selling vodka by volume. Clean corn spirit built for soda, tonic, and letting a mild cigar speak.

products.menuLine: Weller Special Reserve · Kentucky · $28 · 90 proof (45.0% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: vanilla, honey

guidance.bestFor: Pappy-adjacent request, wheated bourbon curious, approachable upgrade from BT.
guidance.avoidIf: User needs lowest shelf or cask-strength only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants wheated bourbon without Pappy pricing — honey, vanilla, soft oak.
guidance.memberBlurb: Weller Special Reserve — honeyed wheated bourbon on the Buffalo Trace mash bill. The pour people mean when they cannot get Pappy.

products.menuLine: Woodford Reserve Kentucky Straight Bourbon · Kentucky · $38 · 90.4 proof (45.2% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: cocoa, oak

guidance.bestFor: Member wants polished bourbon between entry and allocated, medium cigar night.
guidance.avoidIf: User needs lowest price point or maximum peat/smoke.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend for cocoa-oak balance beside a medium-bodied cigar — step up from Buffalo Trace without collector pricing.
guidance.memberBlurb: Woodford Reserve — dried fruit, orange, and cocoa over cinnamon, toffee, and chocolate. Official pot-still profile built for a medium cigar.

products.menuLine: Woodford Reserve Double Oaked · Kentucky · $65 · 90.4 proof (45.2% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: toffee, dark chocolate

guidance.bestFor: Member already likes Woodford standard, wants dessert bourbon.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants dry or smoky only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when toffee and dark chocolate in the glass should match a maduro — double-oak depth.
guidance.memberBlurb: Woodford Double Oaked — toffee and dark chocolate from a second barrel pass. Dessert bourbon that still belongs beside a serious cigar.

products.menuLine: WhistlePig 10 Year · Vermont (sourced) · $85 · 100 proof (50% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: pepper, mint

guidance.bestFor: User asks for rye, spice-forward cigar, or bourbon drinker ready for rye.
guidance.avoidIf: User dislikes spice heat or wants unpeated Scotch only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants to learn rye — pepper and mint over oak without losing body.
guidance.memberBlurb: WhistlePig 10 — allspice and orange peel over caramel, rye spice, and mint with a butterscotch finish. Brand-official 100-proof rye lesson.

products.menuLine: Wild Turkey 101 · Kentucky · $28 · 101 proof (50.5% ABV) · Journey: Novice · Notes: caramel, vanilla

guidance.bestFor: Value bourbon, Old Fashioned base, rye-curious step up from BT.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants wheated or ultra-smooth only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend as the benchmark 101-proof bourbon — spice, caramel, and oak without luxury pricing.
guidance.memberBlurb: Wild Turkey 101 — the benchmark Kentucky bourbon at 101 proof. Rye spice and caramel that teach structure without allocated nonsense.
